SEARCH

Uses of Class
product.Category

Packages that use Category
Package
Description
discount
It includes all the methods and classes necessary to apply and create discounts.
product
It includes everything product-unique.
search
This packages contains all the tools needed to make a search.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.
user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store.
